title: Hozelock 2291 Double Male Connector
features: Made from the highest quality materials for ultimate durability
Can be used to extend the length of garden hose or use as a temporary repair solution
description: From the manufacturer Hozelock Double-Ended Male Connector Extend your reach or quickly fix hose issues with the durable Hozelock Double-Ended Male Connector – the perfect solution for uninterrupted watering! Double-Ended Male Connector The Hozelock Double-Ended Male Connector offers a versatile and reliable solution for extending your garden hose or temporarily repairing damaged sections, ensuring uninterrupted water flow. Extend or Repair with Ease : Effortlessly connect two hoses together to extend your watering reach or temporarily repair a damaged hose section without disrupting your watering routine. Premium Quality Materials : Crafted from high-quality materials, this connector is designed to withstand regular use and outdoor conditions, offering durability and long-lasting performance. Secure Connections : The double-ended male connector ensures tight, leak-free connections between two female hose ends, preventing water wastage and maintaining a strong flow. Hozelock System Compatible : Fully compatible with all Hozelock hose systems, this connector integrates easily into your existing setup, making it a convenient addition to your garden tools. Key Benefits Include: Premium Durability: Made from high-quality materials for long-lasting use in tough conditions. Extend Your Hose Length: Connect two hoses to extend reach for larger gardens or extra length. Versatile Repair Solution: Ideal for temporarily joining damaged hoses while maintaining water flow. Hozelock Compatible: Seamlessly fits with all Hozelock connectors, enhancing your watering system.
